headline: CSCO Stock Slipped ~4% This Week Even as AI Infrastructure Orders Surged
summary: Cisco Systems (NASDAQ:CSCO) shares are trading around $77, down 4.7% over the past week, even as the business story looks stronger than it has in years. Cisco posted $15.35 billion in Q2 FY2026 revenue, up 10% year over year, and management guided for full-year revenue of $61.2 billion to $61.7 billion, which would be the ... headline: GE Aerospace Is Down 14% This Month While Its $190 Billion Backlog Keeps Growing

headline: Intel Jumps 8%, AMD Rises 3%: A $14.2 Billion Fab Deal and AI Momentum Lift the Chip Sector
summary: The chip sector is rallying Wednesday morning, with Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) shares up 8% and Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) stock rising 3% in early trading. The two moves reflect distinct catalysts, but together they signal that investors are choosing company-specific optimism over macro caution today. INTC stock opened at $44.13 and is trading near $47.50 as ... Intel Jumps 8%, AMD Rises 3%: A $14.2 Billion Fab Deal and AI Momentum Lift the Chip Sector

headline: Iran’s Revolutionary Guard Threatens to Strike U.S. Companies in Mideast
summary: Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps issued a warning to several major international corporations, alleging their involvement in operations conducted by the U.S. and Israel against Iran and said they would be treated as “legitimate targets.

headline: Is Cisco’s Quantum Networking Push With Atom Computing Reshaping Its AI Infrastructure Story (CSCO)?
summary: In March 2026, Atom Computing announced it had signed a Memorandum of Understanding with Cisco to explore linking neutral-atom quantum computers over quantum networks, aiming to build scalable, distributed quantum systems by aligning Cisco’s networking technology with Atom’s quantum hardware. This collaboration introduces quantum networking and distributed quantum computing as an additional technology vector for Cisco, expanding its role beyond classical networking and security...
